words.example: The oak is old. - Le chêne est vieux.
Maple syrup comes from maple. - Le sirop d'érable vient de l'érable.
Pine trees stay green. - Les pins restent verts.
The willow hangs low. - Le saule pend bas.
The rose smells sweet. - La rose sent doux.
The sunflower follows the sun. - Le tournesol suit le soleil.
